languages.text: "Удобный для меня ориентир. Для твоего же блага тебе лучше разобраться в том, о чем я говорю, после отбытия через врата".
"A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
languages.original_text: "Удобный для меня ориентир. Для твоего же блага тебе лучше разобраться в том, о чем я говорю, после отбытия через врата".

traits.locale_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you had best understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
"A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you had best understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
"A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
"A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."
"A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

languages.text: “只是个方便的地标。为了你自己着想，最好能在穿过那道门之后，尽力领会我说的意思。”
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: “只是个方便的地标。为了你自己着想，最好能在穿过那道门之后，尽力领会我说的意思。”

languages.text: «Es un lugar que me conviene. Por tu bien, esfuérzate en entender de qué estoy hablando una vez atravieses la puerta».
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: «Es un lugar que me conviene. Por tu bien, esfuérzate en entender de qué estoy hablando una vez atravieses la puerta».

languages.text: « Un repère des plus pratiques pour moi. Rendez-vous service et réfléchissez bien à mes paroles après votre départ pour le portail. »
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: « Un repère des plus pratiques pour moi. Rendez-vous service et réfléchissez bien à mes paroles après votre départ pour le portail. »

languages.text: "Benim için uygun bir yer işareti. Geçitten geçtikten sonra neden bahsettiğimi anlamak için elinden geleni yapman, iyiliğine olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: "Benim için uygun bir yer işareti. Geçitten geçtikten sonra neden bahsettiğimi anlamak için elinden geleni yapman, iyiliğine olacaktır."

languages.text: "Eine praktische Landmarke für mich. Es wäre in deinem besten Interesse, wenn du verstündest, wovon ich rede, nachdem du das Tor passiert hast."
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: "Eine praktische Landmarke für mich. Es wäre in deinem besten Interesse, wenn du verstündest, wovon ich rede, nachdem du das Tor passiert hast."

languages.text: 「私にとって都合の良い目印です。ゲートを通って出てから、私が言っていることを理解しようと最善を尽くしてください。」
languages.original_text: "A convenient landmark for me. For your own sake, you would do your best to understand what I am speaking of after you depart through the gate."

traits.locale_text: 「私にとって都合の良い目印です。ゲートを通って出てから、私が言っていることを理解しようと最善を尽くしてください。」
